overall.description: Nighttime dashcam footage of a car driving on a rain-soaked highway. The vehicle passes under multiple overpasses and crosses a large suspension bridge with distinctive tall white towers, with windshield wipers active throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway at night in heavy rain

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the highway in heavy rain with wipers active, following traffic ahead

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same lane maintaining distance

entered.detail: metal guardrails running along both sides of the highway
tall streetlights illuminating the wet highway surface
green directional signs mounted over the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving on a multi-lane highway at night during heavy rain. The windshield wipers move continuously as the car follows other vehicles ahead, with streetlights and guardrails visible along the wet road.

events.description: entering covered area under large concrete overpass structure
navigating right curve under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: navigating a curved section of highway passing under concrete overpasses

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass passing overhead and alongside
green highway exit signs mounted on the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The car passes under a large concrete overpass structure, temporarily sheltering from the rain. The road curves to the right as exit signs become visible overhead, with the environment becoming more enclosed by concrete infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: suspension bridge with tall white towers

events.description: entering large suspension bridge with distinctive tall white towers
driving between the massive white bridge towers with suspension cables visible

agents.ego_description: crossing the suspension bridge at steady speed, passing between the tall illuminated towers

notable_agents.action: car traveling on the right side of the bridge deck

entered.detail: massive white suspension bridge towers with blue accent lighting rising high above the deck
thick suspension cables running from the towers down to the bridge deck
metal safety railings along the sides of the bridge deck

segments.scene_description: The car emerges onto a massive suspension bridge with towering white pylons illuminated against the night sky. The vehicle drives straight between the tall towers while suspension cables frame the view, with other cars visible on the multi-lane bridge deck.

events.description: exiting the suspension bridge back to regular highway section

agents.ego_description: continuing on the highway after exiting the bridge, maintaining speed in heavy rain

entered.detail: green directional highway signs indicating upcoming exits

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the car returns to a standard highway section with regular guardrails and overhead signs. The rain continues as the vehicle maintains steady speed along the multi-lane road, leaving the distinctive bridge towers behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-soaked highway at night that transitions from an enclosed urban corridor to a massive suspension bridge. It begins with the vehicle following traffic through heavy rain, the windshield wipers moving steadily against a backdrop of streetlights and guardrails. As the car moves forward, the environment becomes more enclosed while passing under a large concrete overpass and curving right past overhead exit signs. The scene then opens up as the vehicle emerges onto a vast suspension bridge, driving straight between towering illuminated white pylons and suspension cables that frame the night sky. Finally, the camera leaves the bridge structure behind, returning to a standard multi-lane highway section with regular guardrails as the rain continues to fall.
